name: Wand of Noisome Acid (4nd-Rank)
description:
This greasy stick emits a stomach-churning scent when held in a hand.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast Acid Grip at 4th rank. A creature that takes initial acid damage from this spell become Sickened 1. Use your spell DC if the creature attempts to recover from this sickness. This is an olfactory effect.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of acid grip at 4th rank
